hook.text: Behind the scenes coaching: how to create story sequences that generate leads

sections.name: Philosophy
sections.summary: Give in public, take in private. Stories = backstage

sections.name: Examples
sections.summary: 6 real sequences with results (14K-17K views, 70K revenue)

sections.name: Live build
sections.summary: Creates 3-slide sequence with Ash in real time

key_phrases: your story should never feel like a business
I give in public and take in private
nobody wants to hear you talk

strengths: Most articulate explanation of daily story principles

belief_change.old_belief: Stories are just casual daily updates
belief_change.mechanism: Intentional 3-slide sequences with CTA generate consistent leads
belief_change.new_belief: Stories are the highest leverage lead gen tool for founders

generation_mapping.big_idea: Las stories diarias son un sistema de lead gen con reglas opuestas a las destacadas

what_to_steal: H37: Daily stories rules are opposite to highlighted stories in 4 dimensions
3-slide format: desired result + reality/identification + CTA with scarcity
Perceived value by context: anchor on previous price/volume, give free
45min weekly batch: prepare all sequences Monday, publish 1/day
Broad first story for reach, niche second story for filter
what_not_to_copy: Zero vulnerability — ADP needs emotional connection
ManyChat automation — WhatsApp setter is better for Patricia
Lifestyle symbols (Lambo, luxury) — cotidianidad is ADP advantage
craft_notes: Most producible format seen across 18+ creators (10 min, 3 photos, 3 texts)
MM3 (market determines structure) is genuinely new — first creator to articulate this
Confirms Estrategia B at scale (70K from one sequence)
H8 needs bifurcation: H8a (highlighted no CTA) + H8b (daily always CTA)
